description.zh: 研究土壤侵蚀过程与机理，开发水土保持技术与措施，关注冻融作用、降雨径流等对坡面侵蚀的影响。
description.en: Studying soil erosion processes and mechanisms, developing conservation techniques, with focus on freeze-thaw effects and rainfall-runoff impacts on hillslope erosion.

description.zh: 利用InSAR、Google Earth Engine等多源遥感技术，定量监测土壤侵蚀、热融灾害等地表过程的时空演变特征。
description.en: Utilizing InSAR, Google Earth Engine, and other multi-source remote sensing technologies for quantitative monitoring of spatiotemporal dynamics of soil erosion and thaw-induced hazards.

title.zh: 土壤有机碳形成与转化

description.zh: 探究土壤有机碳的形成、转化与稳定机制，关注微生物驱动的碳循环过程及其对全球变化的响应。
description.en: Exploring the formation, transformation, and stabilization of soil organic carbon, with a focus on microbially-driven carbon cycling and its response to global change.

title.zh: 植物多样性与土壤水碳耦合

description.zh: 研究植物多样性如何影响土壤水分运移和碳循环过程，揭示植物-土壤-水分的耦合机制，为生态系统管理提供科学依据。
description.en: Investigating how plant diversity affects soil water transport and carbon cycling, revealing plant-soil-water coupling mechanisms to inform ecosystem management.
